# cmdk-vectorized demo

> Live demo of vector-database search for a cmdk command palette, with browser speech-to-text voice input.

This app demonstrates cmdk-vectorized: a Redux-backed settings shell where the command palette queries Weaviate for ranked results. Voice mode transcribes speech and runs the same vector search.

## Links

- [Live demo](https://settings-demo-redux.vercel.app)
- [Demo video](https://settings-demo-redux.vercel.app/demo.mp4)
- [Package README](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/blob/main/README.md)
- [LLM guide](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/blob/main/docs/llm-guide.md)
- [API docs](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/blob/main/docs/api.md)
- [Example source](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/tree/main/examples/settings-demo-redux)

## Install the package

```bash
npm install cmdk-vectorized cmdk react react-dom
npx cmdk-vectorized integrate
```
